aaveDebt(address).notice: Per-protocol debt tracking — fed into cross-protocol score.

creditScore(address).notice: Credit score — delegates to Stylus engine if set, falls back to         on-chain calculation otherwise (graceful degradation during deploy).

creditScoreBreakdown(address).notice: Full score breakdown from the Stylus engine — for frontend display.

prevUtilizationBps(address).notice: Utilization snapshot 7 days ago — fed into volatility calculation.

recordAaveBorrow(address,uint256).notice: Called by CreditRouter when a borrow is routed to Aave.

recordAaveRepay(address,uint256).notice: Called by CreditRouter on repayment — reduces per-protocol debt.

recordCompoundBorrow(address,uint256).notice: Called by CreditRouter when a borrow is routed to Compound.

scoreBreakdown(address).notice: Legacy 6-value scoreBreakdown — satisfies original ICreditManager interface.         Use creditScoreBreakdown() for the full 8-value Stylus breakdown.

scoreEngine().notice: Arbitrum Stylus CreditScoreEngine — handles all score math in WASM.

setScoreEngine(address).notice: Set the Stylus score engine. One-time — cannot be replaced.

unfreeze(address).notice: Unfreeze an account — allows router to reinstate a user after review.
